titleStmt.title: SII 37.399: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 399. (A.R. No. B 46 of 1941-42.) Palugurāḷḷapalli, Badvel Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Broken slab lying in the compound of the Chennakēśava temple.
This undated inscription may be assigned to the 15th century on the basis of palaeography.

Beginning lost. It registers the remission of taxes like Kāvali-kāṇike rokha-dhānya (rent in cash and kind) etc., on lands granted to the donee (name lost) for the ḍōlu and nāgasvara services rendered by them in the temples of Śomēśvara and Chennakēśava. The lands in question are called Kāṇāchi-mānyas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nyaṁ cennakēśavadēvunikinni sōmēśvara dēvunikinni
ḍōḷlanāgasarāla vūḍigānaku beṭinamānyaṁ
cēlumaḷlakunnu nīku maṁgali mānyānaku ce
llivaccē cēlu maḷlu tōṁṭalaku mēmu konē kāva
li kānike rokha dhānyālu sa¨rva¨rmumaṁnniṁcci sa¨rva
mānyaṁ śēstimi . yī kāṇāci mānyālu mīku ya
ṁttakālaṁ cellivaccunu Aṁtakālamunnu celli
vaccēṭugānu mā peddalaku puṇyamugānu
sa¨rvamānyaṁ śēstimi . I dharma śāsana maryāda mī
putra pautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu naḍavagaladu
ṭani Iccivēyiṁcina dharma śāsanaṁ . yī dharma śāsana
maryādaku yavvaru tappi naḍacinānu vāru
kukkamāṁsānaku Āśapaḍḍavāru Avuduru
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ
paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt
śrī śrī śrīṁ jēyunu
Digital edition of SII 37.399 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
